ddls:
CREATE TABLE "aeronautical_data" (
  "storage_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each aeronautical data entity */,
  "absolute_height_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating whether the data entity is at an absolute height above surface level */,
  "adjacent_fir_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier of the adjacent FIR (Flight Information Region) */,
  "adjacent_uir_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier of the adjacent UIR (Upper Information Region) */,
  "airspace_boundary_record_storage_number" TEXT /* Storage number of the associated airspace boundary record */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of aeronautical data (airspace, navigation aid, or obstacle) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the aeronautical data */,
  "revision_number" TEXT /* Revision number of the aeronautical data */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the latest revision */,
  "data_validity_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of data validity period */,
  "data_validity_end_date" TEXT /* End date of data validity period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "airspace_boundaries" (
  "storage_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each airspace boundary */,
  "boundary_type" TEXT /* Type of airspace boundary (lateral or vertical) */,
  "coordinate_list" TEXT /* List of coordinates defining the airspace boundary */,
  "altitude_lower_limit" TEXT /* Lower altitude limit of the airspace boundary (in feet) */,
  "altitude_upper_limit" TEXT /* Upper altitude limit of the airspace boundary (in feet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "navigation_aids" (
  "storage_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each navigation aid */,
  "aid_type" TEXT /* Type of navigation aid (VOR, NDB, or DME) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the navigation aid */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the navigation aid (in kHz) */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of the navigation aid (in nautical miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "obstacles" (
  "storage_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each obstacle */,
  "obstacle_type" TEXT /* Type of obstacle (natural or man-made) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the obstacle */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the obstacle (in feet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, editor, or viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission of the user (read, write, or delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("username", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "storage_number" TEXT /* Storage number of the revised data */,
  "revision_number" TEXT /* Revision number of the data */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the revision */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who made the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_number", "revision_number")
)
